text: Apple announced new privacy features in London during 2024, while Microsoft expanded cloud services for health organizations.
Google opened an AI research hub in Amman to support Arabic language products across Jordan and the wider region.
Microsoft and Apple invested $5 million in a joint education program focused on responsible artificial intelligence.
A Jordan-based startup reported 25% revenue growth after signing enterprise contracts with Google and regional banks.
The London Chamber of Commerce said technology exports could reach $5 million by 2030 if digital trade rules improve.
Apple suppliers in Europe revised their 2024 forecasts after demand increased in education and business markets.
The World Health Organization warned that climate change is increasing hospital demand across Jordan and North Africa.
Doctors in Amman partnered with Microsoft to analyze patient scheduling data and reduce waiting times by 25%.
The United Nations and the World Health Organization launched a 2030 public health initiative in London.
Google supported a university program in Jordan that teaches data literacy to 500 students in Amman.
Microsoft donated cloud credits worth $5 million to schools building AI labs before the 2030 academic roadmap.
Apple and local educators introduced accessibility workshops for students in London during 2024.
The United Nations published a 2030 climate policy brief that cited water pressure in Jordan and urban heat in Amman.
Google researchers used satellite data to measure air quality changes near London and forecast a 25% emissions decline.
The World Health Organization linked extreme heat to health risks and urged governments to prepare by 2030.
Jordan and the United Nations discussed digital policy standards in Amman for secure public services.
A 2024 policy forum in London included Microsoft, Google, and privacy regulators from the European Union.
The Ministry of Digital Economy in Jordan proposed a 25% increase in cybersecurity training funds.
The Amman marathon attracted runners from London and raised $5 million for youth sports programs.
A Jordan football club signed a sponsorship agreement with Apple for analytics equipment before the 2024 season.
Microsoft provided cloud dashboards for a regional sports federation tracking athlete performance through 2030.

ناقشت منظمة الصحة العالمية مع أطباء في الأردن خطط الصحة العامة لعام 2024.
افتتحت Google برنامجا تعليميا في عمّان لمساعدة الطلاب على تعلم الذكاء الاصطناعي.
